title: RepoOrchestrator Registry
description: Master source of truth for all managed repos and their specialist agents.

generatedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp of the last full generation.

name.description: Short identifier — matches the directory name.

path.description: Relative path from workspace root, e.g. './auth-service'.

agentType.description: The Claude Code agent name, e.g. 'repo-auth-service'.

agentFile.description: Relative path to the generated agent markdown file.

contextFile.description: Relative path to the editable context markdown file.

languages.description: Programming languages detected in this repo.

owns.description: Routing keywords / domain areas this repo owns.

consumes.description: Events this repo subscribes to from other services.

dependsOn.description: Names of other repos this repo depends on.

providesTo.description: Names of other repos that consume this repo's APIs/events.

fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hash of indexed inputs for drift detection.

lastIndexed.description: ISO8601 timestamp of the last index run.

userEdited.description: True when a human has manually edited this entry. /repo-orch-sync will not overwrite user-edited entries without confirmation.

owner.description: Ownership and contact information for this repo.

contact.description: Slack channel, email alias, or GitHub team.

deprecates.description: Older API versions this release supersedes, e.g. ['v1'].

authContracts.description: Auth and authorization contracts for this service.

requires.description: JWT claims required on inbound requests, e.g. ['sub (userId UUID)', 'role (admin|user)'].

issues.description: JWT claims this service adds to tokens it issues (auth services only).

scopes.description: OAuth scopes or RBAC roles required to call endpoints, e.g. ['read:orders', 'write:payments'].

errorContracts.description: Error handling contracts callers depend on.

codes.description: HTTP status codes deliberately returned and their semantics, e.g. ['400 validation failure', '503 dependency down'].

idempotent.description: Whether mutating endpoints are idempotent (safe to retry on timeout). true | false | 'partial — see Known issues'.

retryOn.description: HTTP status codes callers may safely retry, e.g. ['503', '429'].

retryStrategy.description: Retry strategy callers should use, e.g. 'exponential backoff, max 3 attempts'.

configContracts.description: Shared environment variables and feature flags.

envVars.description: Environment variables shared with or depended on from other services, e.g. ['JWT_SECRET (shared with auth-service)'].

featureFlags.description: Feature flags that affect public behavior, e.g. ['ENABLE_NEW_CHECKOUT (LaunchDarkly)'].

dataContracts.description: DB tables and cache keys other services access directly.

sharedTables.description: DB tables or columns read/written by other services, e.g. ['users.id (read by notifications)'].

sharedCacheKeys.description: Cache keys other services depend on, e.g. ['session:<userId> (read by api-gateway)'].

serviceLevel.description: Service level objectives for this service.

throughput.description: Throughput target, e.g. '500 RPS sustained, burst to 2000'.

degradedMode.description: Behavior when dependencies are unavailable, e.g. 'returns cached data when DB is unreachable'.

testContracts.description: Test suites and contract tests that encode cross-repo behavior.

integrationSuite.description: Command to run integration tests, e.g. 'npm run test:integration in auth-service'.

contractTests.description: Pact or CDC test file paths, e.g. ['pact/auth-payments.json'].

e2eScenarios.description: Key end-to-end scenarios covered, e.g. ['checkout happy path', '401 on expired token'].
